page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.7xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, providing 32 vCPUs. The memory configuration consists of 128.0 GB of RAM, which equates to 4.0 GB per core. This server does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core CPU performance and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the weak category, with single-threaded gzip compression registering as poor. Conversely, multi-core benchmarks, including stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU scores, consistently rank in the average tier. Memory bandwidth tests for both small and large blocks, along with multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, also demonstrate average performance.

Given the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this server aligns with general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation supports multi-threaded tasks such as software compilation, database operations, and static web serving, all of which achieved average tier results in testing. However, the weak single-core performance presents a bottleneck for single-threaded processing tasks. The absence of local storage means all storage requirements must be handled via network-attached options, and the lack of a GPU limits its utility for heavy parallel computing or large-scale AI training, though it can handle small to medium LLM inference at average speeds.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.7xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server featuring 32 dedicated physical cores (32 vCPUs) powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor at 2.5 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. It operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps, containing no local storage or GPUs. Performance benchmarks show a distinct contrast: single-core performance is weak, with single-threaded gzip compression ranking in the bottom 10%, while multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently achieve average tier results. This resource profile makes the server suitable for multi-threaded workloads such as software compilation, static web serving, and database operations, though it is less efficient for single-threaded applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.7xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 6 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core and weak single-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.7xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and average multi-core performance.
tagline: A dedicated 32-core x86_64 server with 128 GB RAM, offering balanced multi-core performance for general-purpose and database workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8163 processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs
128.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Average multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and database performance
Weak single-core performance and poor single-threaded compression speeds
Suited for multi-threaded workloads, static web serving, and database operations
